sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71862" key="custobo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξυστοβόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71862.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spear-darting,</tr_> of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
